expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Let workspace admins invite, manage, revoke, and audit membership changes.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add workspace membership role and invitation support",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want membership records to support invitations and editable roles so that admin actions use consistent domain rules.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace membership domain supports viewer, editor, and admin roles",
        "Pending invitations store invitee email and workspace context",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/models/workspaceMembership.ts",
        "src/models/workspaceInvitation.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Invite workspace members by email",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to invite members by email so that I can grant access without database edits.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings page accepts an email address and target role for a new invitation",
        "Submitting an invitation creates a pending invitation for the selected workspace",
        "Invitation action records an audit entry for the invite event",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/pages/workspace/settings/MembersTab.tsx",
        "src/server/workspaces/inviteMember.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Change workspace member roles",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to change a member role so that access matches current responsibilities.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings page lets admins switch member roles between viewer, editor, and admin",
        "Role changes persist immediately for the selected member",
        "Role change action records an audit entry with previous and new roles",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/pages/workspace/settings/MemberRow.tsx",
        "src/server/workspaces/changeMemberRole.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Revoke workspace access",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to revoke workspace access so that I can remove members when needed.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings page provides a revoke action for existing members",
        "Revoking access removes or disables the member record for that workspace",
        "Revoke action records an audit entry for the removal event",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/pages/workspace/settings/MemberRow.tsx",
        "src/server/workspaces/revokeMemberAccess.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Show recent membership changes in workspace settings",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes so that I can audit who was invited, updated, or removed.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings page shows recent membership audit entries in reverse chronological order",
        "Audit view includes invite, role change, and revoke events with actor and timestamp details",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/pages/workspace/settings/MembershipAuditList.tsx",
        "src/server/workspaces/listMembershipAuditEvents.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.

expectations.text: No story title is a horizontal layer split such as build backend or build frontend.
